samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Implement a 16-bit divider with an 8-bit divisor in combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <lines>
            <line id="state">The module has no FSM.</line>
        </lines>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        Always block triggered by changes in inputs A and B. 
        If the bits of the dividend (a_reg) are greater than the divisor (b_reg), 
        set the quotient (result) to 1 and update the remainder (odd) with the difference. 
        Repeat the process until all bits of the dividend are processed.
    </implementation>
    <task>
        <description>Implement division logic.</description>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
        <lines>
            <line>if (a_reg[15:8] >= b_reg) begin</line>
            <line>    a_reg[15:8] = a_reg[15:8] - b_reg;</line>
            <line>    result[15] = 1;</line>
            <line>end</line>
            <line>if (a_reg[15:8] >= b_reg) begin</line>
            <line>    a_reg[15:8] = a_reg[15:8] - b_reg;</line>
            <line>    result[15] = 1;</line>
            <line>end</line>
        </lines>
    </task>
</module>
